scripts.migrate:d1: node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.migrate:d1:local: CI=1 node scripts/run-timed.mjs 60 -- wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.deploy: pnpm run migrate:d1 && node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js deploy
